argument_quality_notes.linguistic: Agent hallucinated the text 'سورية' on the sign. Its entire argument rests on this fabricated evidence.
argument_quality_notes.landscape: Agent did not debate; provided generic but accurate landscape analysis.
argument_quality_notes.botanics: Agent did not debate; provided generic but accurate botanical analysis.
argument_quality_notes.regulatory: Agent repeated the hallucinated text claim in the debate without verifying it against the image.
argument_quality_notes.meta: Agent conceded immediately to the hallucinated text claim without verifying the sign's content.

revision_justification_notes.meta: Agent revised its position based on a hallucinated claim from the linguistic agent, failing to verify the visual evidence.

debate_contribution_notes.linguistic: Agent contributed no new information, only repeated the hallucinated claim.
debate_contribution_notes.regulatory: Agent contributed no new information, only repeated the hallucinated claim.
debate_contribution_notes.meta: Agent contributed nothing but a concession to the hallucination.

linguistic: The sign on the left contains the word 'سورية' (Syria/Syrian)
The sign on the left explicitly contains the word 'سورية' (Syria)
The sign on the left explicitly contains the word 'سورية' (Syria), which serves as a hard linguistic constraint

meta: the linguistic agent has identified a hard constraint: the word 'سورية' (Syria) on the storefront sign
the linguistic agent has identified a hard constraint: the word 'سورية' (Syria) explicitly written on the commercial signage

verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator paired Meta against Linguistic and Regulatory agents. While this follows the rule of pairing Meta against hard-constraint agents, the moderator failed to verify the 'hard constraint' (the text) before initiating the debate. The pairing was procedurally correct but substantively flawed because it pitted a correct agent against a hallucinating one.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge followed the hallucinated evidence as a 'hard constraint' and accepted the concession from the Meta agent. The judge failed to verify the visual evidence (the sign text) and thus reached the wrong conclusion.
